feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Option for combining multiple materials into one PR when MRP runs in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We have a S/4HANA public cloud and are looking for options for combining multiple materials into one PR when MRP runs.

Currently MRP run is creating a separate PR for each material however we want to have all the materials in a single PR after MRP is run using sales order. 

Do you have any suggestions/thoughts?

entry.title: Processing Payment Rejections in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
How to process Payment Rejection Files in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Storage type search with wildcard: No entry found for item 10
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In Manage outbound Delivery Orders app, in create pick warehouse task, getting this error 

"Storage type search with wildcard: No entry found for item 10" 

1. configured the storage type search sequence for removal, assigned the storage type to the sequence, set up the removal indicator, determine the storage type search sequence for removal and optimise access strategies.

2. assigned the removal indicator to product in Manage product master -> warehouse view.

3. this works perfectly fine for SAP created storage type using storage type templates but not for the one created manually. replicated the same steps steps SAP used while creating the template but this does not work.

Regards,

Saranya

entry.title: Creation of Custom Sales Document type
entry.content:
Is it possible to create multiple Z-Order Types copying standard order type OR?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: no permissions to create and activate the SSCUI - 105518 “Enable document and report compliance"
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to enable document and report compliance features in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system. However, it does not allow me to activate.

I get that I do not have permission. But my user has all the expert and administration roles.

does not allow to create a record.

What role might be missing?
What would be the procedure to execute the permission ?

Thank you very much.

Best regards,

Antony Pantoja

entry.title: ISLM embedded scenario in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I try to create ISLM embedded scenario. but in my public cloud system custom training dataset is not showing (z_trainning CDS view entity). and I observed package also not showing in my system. please guide me.

I tried following blogs: 

View an Intelligent Scenario Detail | SAP Help Portal

Custom embedded Machine Learning app in S/4HANA - SAP Community @Masaaki

Thanks.

entry.title: Penetration testing in Test Automation Tool
entry.content:
Dear Sap Team, 

I would like to request permission to conduct penetration testing in the Test Automation Tool. 

Best Regards.

entry.title: CDS View Availability for App “Display Change Logs - Sales Documents”
entry.content:
We’re trying to determine if there is a released CDS view available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that supports the standard Fiori app “Display Change Logs – Sales Documents” (App ID: F7356).

The app is backed by OData V4 service C_SLSDOCCHANGEDOCUMENTITEM_SD, but none of the related internal CDS views (e.g., I_ChangeDocumentItem) appear to be released for use.

Is there any released CDS view available for customer reporting or extension that provides access to change document data for Sales Documents in public cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: New Entries & Copy functionality/Button for Sales Document Types Disabled in Starter System
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,


Need urgent help, We are in between configuration of Sales document type in Starter customizing system  and found New Sales Document Types cannot be created as new Entries or Copy As existing the Z-Customized the Sales Document Types is in Starter System.


Please help to fix the challenges for same and also for other such configuration like Delivery or other else.


Regards


PERSON_NAME Singhal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Order Item Requested Delivery Date
entry.content:
There is a requirement for reporting the requested delivery date at the sales order line item level.
In the reports available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the Requested Delivery Date is pulling from the sales order header (Ovrl Requested Delivery Date), not from the line item level, which causes inaccurate reporting for line-specific delivery planning.

Is there any standard report or app in S/4HANA Public Cloud that can show the Requested Delivery Date at item level, or is this currently only possible through custom development or consulting?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The committed amount is not updated when a purchase order or purchase requisition is rejected.
entry.content:
In the case where a purchase order is rejected in the flexible workflow, the committed amount is not updated. 

Is there a way to update automatically the committed amount  when the task of the workflow is rejected?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: FINS_ACDOC_POST133 House Bank still assigned to wrong G/L sub account
entry.content:
FINS_ACDOC_POST133 House Bank still assigned to wrong G/L sub account

New G/L Accounts for Bank Accounts

As starting point we created nee G/L Accounts for showing in more detail the related bank accounts in the balance sheet.

  • 11001900 Raiffeisen Bank Account – HUF
  • 11001901 Raiffeisen Bank Account – EUR
  • 11001902 Raiffeisen Bank Account – USD

For example:

 

and the related bank transfer subaccounts.

11001920 Raiffeisen Bank Transfer – HUF

11001921 Raiffeisen Bank Transfer - EUR

11001922 Raiffeisen Bank Transfer – USD

For example:

 

 

New Bank Accounts

Then we created accordingly the new bank account master data.

For example:

 

Upload Bank Statement

Now I want to upload the bank statement. However, for posting the statement an error message shows up.

FINS_ACDOC_POST133

 

Analysis

I reviewed the following

Note: 3376166 - House bank & & is not assigned to G/L account & in company code & (FINS_ACDOC_POST133) - SAP for Me

Blog: How to use Bank Reconciliation Account in Payment ... - SAP Community

This is the configuration in SSCUI 101024 but I can´t figure out how to adjust the settings in order to post to 11001920 instead of 11001080.

 

What do I need to adjust for changing the accounting determination subject to the new subaccounts created?

Many thanks

Sebastian

entry.title: Landed Cost Management in SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Dears

Our customer manages their inventory using the Moving Average Price method.

During the procurement process, after the materials are received, they often receive additional charges from different vendors (such as freight, customs, transportation,...), which affect the actual cost of the received items.

Could you please advise on the recommended approach to handle landed costs in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Thank you

entry.title: Maintain Terms of Payment EMPTY IN INVOICE
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is it possible to create invoices with the TERMS OF PAYMENT field empty?

 

We have removed the business partner assignment and the order already comes with the field empty.

 

But when creating the invoice, it shows us the message that the order is incomplete and it is because it asks us for the payment terms.

Is it possible to create invoices with the TERMS OF PAYMENT field empty?

 

I appreciate your comments.

entry.title: How to configure companies in Zimbabwe
entry.content:
Hello,
Zimbabwean companies are not in the range of countries supported by SAP standard. How can I configure SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for Zimbabwean countries?
1. Is there a standard operation tutorial for configuring non-standard countries separately?
2. Can only CLT function be used? How to operate it specifically?
3. Can CLT function only be used in the customer's configuration system? Can Starter system use this function?

Thanks.

entry.title: 我需要一个产品的最早入库过账日期和最新出库的过账日期的CDS,用于与和其他的CDS做拼接
entry.content:
专家们：

我需要一个“产品”的最早入库“过账日期”和最新出库的“过账日期”的CDS,用这个CDS用于与和其他的CDS做拼接。

CDS :  I_MaterialStock_2 中 有我需要的字段，但是 关键字太多，我不知道如何操作，搞出我要的CDS（产品，工厂，[仓库]，最早入库的过账日期，最新出库的过账日期） ，“仓库”字段 可以不要。

请老师指点实现思路。如果有操作录像更好！

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition

entry.title: Public cloud HR master data of userid and pernr (person number (PA0105))
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to fetch the data from PA0105(HR master data) table in public cloud tenant. I need pernr and userid fields. I tried with custom cds view it's not working, is there any way to call the PA0105 / any standard APIs/ services? 

I checked Overview | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub I couldn't be able to find anything related to HR Master.

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Cash Pooling including Interest Calculation
entry.content:
Hi Support,


we would like to implement Cash Pooling in our Public Cloud SAP System. However, we are currently not able to include interest rates / calculation.
Can you please help?

Kind regards
Gaja


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Inquiry/Rework Purchase Order configuration
entry.content:
We are interested in testing out the Inquiry/Rework purchase order functionality, but from reading documentation it is a function that cannot be deactivated if it doesn't work (see blurb below from a community blog post).

We only have a two system landscape and so if we turn it on and it breaks something, we have no way for it to not end up in production when we would need to transport other configuration changes.

Are there any other ways to test this functionality without permanently impacting our systems? The main concern is that we have some BAdI code to allow for approval authority levels and I do not know if that would also require edits to work with the Inquiry/Rework process.

From blog post:

The business function can be switched ON using the configuration step Activate Inquiry Workflow for Purchase Order (SSCUI ID: DIGITS), and is an irreversible switch. Once switched on, it cannot be turned off.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API to get PDF output form from sales order
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are looking for a solution to retrieve PDF output form from sales order to be used in SAP Commerce Cloud integration. 

This functionality is available for billing documents (Get PDF of Billing Document | SAP Help Portal)  but is there any API or any other method to send "order confirmation form" to SAP Commerce Cloud from S/4HANA Public Cloud?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition API Management SAP Commerce Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution)
